archive.title: Archive
archive.guideline: Listen and add sounds you like to your launchpad

empty.mine: You haven't uploaded any sounds yet

upload.heading: Upload sound
upload.subtitleAfter: Fill in the details and tap Done

placeholders.title: e.g. Wow
placeholders.description: Tell us more about this sound (optional)

hints.tags: Max 3. Press Enter or comma to add
hints.nickname: One nickname per device. Changing it also renames all your previous sounds & mixes. Leave blank to be anonymous on all of them.

record.empty: Nothing was recorded. Please try again.
record.micDenied: Microphone permission denied. Please allow it in browser settings.
record.micDeniedDetail:
Microphone access is blocked. Browsers don't allow JS to re-prompt for security.
• iOS Safari: Settings > Safari > Microphone > allow this site
• Mac Safari: Safari > Settings > Websites > Microphone
• Chrome: lock icon 🔒 > Site settings > Microphone
Allow it and refresh, then try recording again.
record.micUnavailable: Microphone unavailable. Check that no other app is using it and try again.

detail.plays: {count, plural, =0 {not played yet} =1 {1 play} other {# plays}}

launchpad.title: Launchpad
launchpad.padCountHint: {occupied}/{total} pads · hold a pad to sustain (loops). Use the Edit button to rearrange.
launchpad.emptyHint: Tap "Add" on a sound in the Archive to fill a pad
launchpad.recordSetupFailed: Couldn't start recording. Tap a pad once to wake the audio engine, then try again.
launchpad.recordEmpty: Nothing was recorded. Try tapping a pad while recording.

record.limitNotice: Recording is capped at 1 minute. It auto-stops past 1 min.

meta.plays: {count, plural, =0 {not played yet} =1 {1 play} other {# plays}}
